results.resolved_title: A widespread bacterial type VI secretion effector superfamily identified using a heuristic approach
results.note: Full text retrieved (B. thailandensis E264 T6SS-1 substrates). Paper names substrates by old BTH_ locus tags (BTH_II0310, BTH_I2691, BTH_I0068, VgrGs); no crosswalk to RefSeq BTH_RS00450 available in text, so this specific locus cannot be confirmed as a named effector.

results.resolved_title: A widespread bacterial type VI secretion effector superfamily identified using a heuristic approach
results.note: Full text retrieved but paper uses BTH_ (not BTH_RS) locus tags; BTH_RS01610 not mappable to a named substrate from retrieved text.

results.resolved_title: A widespread bacterial type VI secretion effector superfamily identified using a heuristic approach
results.quote: We propose the name Tae2 (ype VImidaseffector) for BTH_I0068 ... these data demonstrate that BTH_I0068-BTH_I0069 constitute a T6S EI pair
results.note: BTH_I0068 = Tae2, peptidoglycan amidase effector of B. thailandensis T6SS-1; locus tag matches.

results.resolved_title: A widespread bacterial type VI secretion effector superfamily identified using a heuristic approach
results.note: Full text retrieved; BTH_RS21555 not mappable to a named T6SS-1 substrate from BTH_-tagged text.

results.note: Full text retrieved; BTH_RS25940 not mappable to a named substrate from retrieved text.

results.resolved_title: Systematic Identification and Analysis of Acinetobacter baumannii Type VI Secretion System Effector and Immunity Components
results.quote: group 1 includes the predicted lipase Tse1 ... Tse1, becomes Tle1 for 6SS ipase effector group 1
results.note: A. baumannii ATCC 17978 T6SS effector group 1 (Tse1/Tle1), a cargo lipase effector.

results.resolved_title: Systematic Identification and Analysis of Acinetobacter baumannii Type VI Secretion System Effector and Immunity Components
results.quote: group 3 includes the antibacterial effector Tse3 with unknown function
results.note: A. baumannii ATCC 17978 T6SS effector group 3 (Tse3).

results.resolved_title: Systematic Identification and Analysis of Acinetobacter baumannii Type VI Secretion System Effector and Immunity Components
results.quote: group 4 includes the peptidoglycan hydrolase Tse4 ... Tse4 becomes Tpe4 for 6SS eptidoglycan hydrolase effector group 4
results.note: A. baumannii ATCC 17978 T6SS effector group 4 (Tse4/Tpe4), peptidoglycan hydrolase.

results.resolved_title: Systematic Identification and Analysis of Acinetobacter baumannii Type VI Secretion System Effector and Immunity Components
results.note: Full text retrieved (A. baumannii T6SS effector survey, 32 effector groups). No effector named 'TafE' and locus ACX60_15365 not given; cannot map to a named effector in this paper to verify.

results.resolved_title: Type VI secretion delivers bacteriolytic effectors to target cells
results.quote: the type VI secretion system (T6SS) of P. aeruginosa breaches this barrier to deliver two effector proteins, Tse1 and Tse3, to the periplasm of recipient cells
results.note: P. aeruginosa PAO1 H1-T6SS effector Tse1 (peptidoglycan amidase).

results.resolved_title: Type VI secretion delivers bacteriolytic effectors to target cells
results.quote: One substrate, Tse2, is toxic by an unknown mechanism in the cytoplasm of recipient cells lacking Tsi2, a Tse2-specific immunity protein
results.note: P. aeruginosa PAO1 H1-T6SS substrate Tse2.

results.resolved_title: Type VI secretion delivers bacteriolytic effectors to target cells
results.quote: the type VI secretion system (T6SS) of P. aeruginosa breaches this barrier to deliver two effector proteins, Tse1 and Tse3, to the periplasm of recipient cells
results.note: P. aeruginosa PAO1 H1-T6SS effector Tse3 (muramidase).

results.resolved_title: Translocation of YopJ family effector proteins through the VirB/VirD4 T4SS of Bartonella
results.quote: we report that the Bartonella YopJ-like effector A (ByeA) represents a genuine T4SS effector
results.note: Paper's experimental subject is ByeA (a YopJ-like T4SS effector). BepC is not individually characterized; only BepD is named (as control) and 'Beps (BepA-I)' mentioned collectively. No specific BepC effector evidence.

results.resolved_title: Translocation of YopJ family effector proteins through the VirB/VirD4 T4SS of Bartonella
results.quote: we report that the Bartonella YopJ-like effector A (ByeA) represents a genuine T4SS effector
results.note: Paper is about ByeA, not BepH. BepH never named; cited as source for an effector the paper does not characterize.

results.resolved_title: Secretion and expression of the Pasteurella haemolytica Leukotoxin
results.quote: The Pasteurella haemolytica leukotoxin gene cluster (lktCABD) is homologous to the Escherichia coli hemolysin locus (hlyCABD)
results.note: Paper is about Mannheimia (Pasteurella) haemolytica lktA, not Mannheimia glucosida. Cited for a homolog in a different species; makes no claim about M. glucosida.

results.resolved_title: Secretion and expression of the Pasteurella haemolytica Leukotoxin
results.quote: a heteroplasmid complementation system was developed that permits secretion of the leukotoxin from cells expressing the hemolysin transport proteins HlyB and HlyD
results.note: Abstract only (full text empty). LktA leukotoxin of Pasteurella (Mannheimia) haemolytica secreted via HlyB/HlyD T1SS machinery.

results.resolved_title: The Type VI secretion system deploys anti-fungal effectors against microbial competitors
results.quote: Deletion of SMDB11_1112 resulted in a 4-fold increase in recovery of viable target cells ... SMDB11_1112 was therefore renamed Tfe1 (6SS anti-ungal ffector)
results.note: Serratia marcescens Db10 T6SS effector. Batch labels SMDB11_1112 'Ssp3' (one of previously-identified T6SS-secreted Ssp1-6); paper renames it Tfe1, an anti-fungal T6SS effector. Locus matches.

results.resolved_title: The Type VI secretion system deploys anti-fungal effectors against microbial competitors
results.quote: removal of SMDB11_1083 resulted in almost complete loss of activity ... SMDB11_1083 therefore represents a second T6SS-delivered anti-fungal effector, named Tfe2
results.note: Serratia marcescens Db10 T6SS anti-fungal effector Tfe2 (SMDB11_1083); locus matches.

results.resolved_title: Proteomic and functional analysis of the suite of Ysp proteins exported by the Ysa type III secretion system of Yersinia enterocolitica Biovar 1B
results.quote: Eight of these Ysps (YspK, YspI, YspE, YspF, YspP, YspY, YspN and YspL) had not previously been characterized ... resulted in Ysa T3S system-dependent increases in cytosolic levels of cAMP for six Ysps (YspK, YspI, YspE, YspF, YspP and YspL)
results.note: Abstract. YspE translocated by Ysa T3SS of Y. enterocolitica Biovar 1B (strain 8081).

results.resolved_title: The Secreted Antifungal Protein Thionin 2.4 in Arabidopsis Suppresses the Toxicity of a Fungal Fruit Body Lectin from Fusarium graminearum
results.quote: the fungal fruit body lectin (FFBL) of Fusarium graminearum was identified as a Thi2.4-interacting protein
results.note: DOI resolves to a plant/fungal paper (Arabidopsis thionin vs Fusarium lectin). No claim about Vibrio parahaemolyticus VopZ or any T3SS effector; cited DOI is wrong for this effector.

results.resolved_title: Stimulation of autophagy suppresses the intracellular survival of Burkholderia pseudomallei in mammalian cell lines
results.quote: we identified a B. pseudomallei type III secreted protein, BopA, which plays a role in mediating bacterial evasion of autophagy
results.note: Abstract. Paper studies B. pseudomallei BopA (T3SS-secreted). Batch organism is B. thailandensis E264, the closely related avirulent surrogate sharing the Bsa T3SS; consistent homolog.

results.resolved_title: Specific interaction between OutD, an Erwinia chrysanthemi outer membrane protein of the general secretory pathway, and secreted proteins
results.quote: We analyzed the interactions of OutD with other components of the GSP (Out proteins) and with secreted proteins (PelB, EGZ and PemA)
results.note: Abstract. PelB is a secreted protein of the Out general secretory pathway (T2SS) in Erwinia chrysanthemi 3937 (= Dickeya dadantii 3937).

results.resolved_title: Chemical Compounds Related to the Predation Risk Posed by Malacophagous Ground Beetles Alter Self-Maintenance Behavior of Naive Slugs (Deroceras reticulatum)
results.quote: This study examines the influence of cuticular extracts from predacious ground beetles ... on the shelter-seeking behavior of naive slugs
results.note: DOI resolves to a slug/ground-beetle ecology paper. No claim about Brucella abortus BspL or any T4SS effector; cited DOI is wrong for this effector.

results.resolved_title: Sam68 sequestration and partial loss of function are associated with splicing alterations in FXTAS patients
results.quote: Fragile X-associated Tremor/Ataxia Syndrome (FXTAS) is a neurodegenerative disorder caused by expansion of 55-200 CGG repeats
results.note: DOI resolves to a human FXTAS/RNA-binding-protein paper. No claim about Legionella pneumophila LegU1 or any T4SS effector; cited DOI is wrong for this effector.

results.resolved_title: Identification and Structural Characterization of a Legionella Phosphoinositide Phosphatase
results.quote: A Legionella effector, SidP, has been identified as a phosphoinositide phosphatase ... Legionella encodes an effector protein, named SidP, that functions as a PI-3-phosphatase
results.note: Abstract. SidP is a translocated Legionella pneumophila (Dot/Icm T4SS) effector with PI-3-phosphatase activity.

results.resolved_title: Quorum Sensing Regulation of the Two hcp Alleles in Vibrio cholerae O1 Strains
results.quote: Hcp which is regarded as one of the important T6SS components and is one of the secreted substrates in non-O1 non-O139 Vibrio cholerae isolates
results.note: VCA0017 is an hcp allele in V. cholerae. Paper establishes Hcp as a secreted T6SS substrate; the O1 strain carries two hcp loci. Consistent with named organism/system.

results.resolved_title: Rust fungal effectors mimic host transit peptides to translocate into chloroplasts
results.quote: we identified chloroplast-targeted protein 1 (CTP1), a candidate effector from the poplar leaf rust fungus Melampsora larici-populina
results.note: DOI resolves to a rust-fungus chloroplast-effector paper. No claim about Bartonella henselae TrwJ1 or any T4SS effector; cited DOI is wrong for this effector.

results.resolved_title: Delivery of CdiA Nuclease Toxins into Target Cells during Contact-Dependent Growth Inhibition
results.quote: CDI is mediated by the CdiB/CdiA family of two-partner secretion proteins ... The CdiA-CT from uropathogenic E. coli 536 (UPEC 536) is a tRNA anticodon nuclease
results.note: CdiA is the secreted effector exoprotein of the CDI two-partner (Type Vb) secretion system; studied here in UPEC 536. Matches organism and T5SS.
